project_type: MQL5 Expert Advisor (MetaTrader 5) - algorithmic trading system
build_system: MetaTrader 5 MetaEditor (not available in sandbox - use AST/syntax validation only)
test_framework: No automated tests - MQL5 is compiled and tested inside MetaTrader 5 platform
build_command: N/A - MQL5 compilation requires MetaEditor which is not available
test_command: N/A - MQL5 testing requires MT5 Strategy Tester
verification_instructions: 1. Verify all .mqh and .mq5 files have valid MQL5 syntax (matching braces, proper types, #include directives). 2. Verify the main EA file includes all parts in correct order. 3. Verify no duplicate function/variable names across files. 4. Check that all referenced functions exist in one of the included files.
setup_instructions: No setup needed - this is a code generation project
environment_constraints: Cannot compile MQL5 code (no MetaEditor). Validation is structural/syntactic only. The output files should be syntactically correct MQL5 that a user can copy into MetaEditor and compile.
contribution_requirements: Files must be saved to the repo root. Each part must be a separate .mqh header file. The main EA must be a .mq5 file that #includes all parts.
key_patterns: Symphony uses: #property strict, #include <Trade\Trade.mqh>, MqlTradeRequest/MqlTradeResult for orders, iATR/CopyBuffer for indicators, ArraySetAsSeries for data, OnInit/OnDeinit/OnTick callbacks, global state variables, structs for data grouping, IOC order filling, hedging account model (simultaneous long+short), per-bar processing with IsNewBar() guard
relevant_files: symphony.txt - BASE: Phase Engine (Phases 1-4), ARC v2 exit, IOC execution, time gates, lot sizing
F16 V70.txt - ADD: Invisible Network (node registry + authority scoring), F72 Curve Object/Tree, Campaign Ownership, Participant zones, Senseei meta-intelligence, Time Intelligence Engine

LETRA 37.txt - ADD: Fixed-TF Structure Engine (f_se on M1/M3/M5/M15/H1/H4), Engine 1A lifecycle, Energy Resolution Framework (EDE+RE+EAE), Wave Intelligence (belief/hypothesis/prediction/validation engines), FRZ zones, V72 Decision Architecture
directory_structure: Flat repo root with source .txt files. Output will be multiple .mqh part files + one main .mq5 EA file at the repo root.
